title: introduction to wealthR
text: wealthR lightweight, zero-dependency R package simple financial forecasting. designed help users model investment growth, savings plans, inflation effects, loan repayment using base R . package focuses small, practical functions easy read, easy test, useful real-world planning.

title: introduction to wealthR
text: package includes tools : simulate long-term investment growth. adjust future values inflation. project savings time. forecast loan balances. compare multiple scenarios. create base R visualizations.

title: introduction to wealthR
code: library(wealthR) # Calculate growth over 30 years raw_wealth <- calc_wealth(principal = 10000, monthly = 500, rate = 0.07, years = 30) head(raw_wealth,20) #>  [1] 10558.33 11119.92 11684.79 12252.95 12824.43 13399.24 13977.40 14558.93 #>  [9] 15143.86 15732.20 16323.97 16919.19 17517.89 18120.08 18725.78 19335.01 #> [17] 19947.80 20564.16 21184.12 21807.69 # Adjust the projection for 3% annual inflation real_wealth <-adjust_inflation(amounts = raw_wealth, inflation_rate = 0.03, years = 30) head(real_wealth,20) #>  [1] 10532.00 11064.53 11597.59 12131.18 12665.32 13199.99 13735.22 14271.00 #>  [9] 14807.34 15344.25 15881.72 16419.77 16958.40 17497.61 18037.41 18577.80 #> [17] 19118.79 19660.39 20202.59 20745.41 # Compare the nominal vs. inflation-adjusted wealth plot_wealth(raw_wealth, title = "Nominal Wealth Projection (7% Return)") plot_wealth(real_wealth, title = "Inflation-Adjusted Wealth (3% Inflation)")

what: Adjust amounts for inflation over time — adjust_inflation
title: Adjust amounts for inflation over time — adjust_inflation
text: Converts monthly series amounts inflation-adjusted values using monthly inflation rate.

title: Adjust amounts for inflation over time — adjust_inflation

text: amounts Numeric vector amounts, one value per month. inflation_rate Numeric scalar. Annual inflation rate expressed decimal. years Numeric scalar. Number years covered series.

what: Calculate projected wealth over time — calc_wealth
title: Calculate projected wealth over time — calc_wealth
text: Computes monthly projected balance initial principal regular monthly contributions given annual rate.

title: Calculate projected wealth over time — calc_wealth
Calculate projected wealth over time — calc_wealth
text: principal Numeric scalar. Initial amount invested. monthly Numeric scalar. Monthly contribution amount. rate Numeric scalar. Annual interest rate expressed decimal. years Numeric scalar. Projection length years.
